title: C# Developer
responsibilities: develop and maintain .NET services; integrate databases and internal systems; improve code quality, observability, and deployment flow
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in c#, .net, asp.net core, sql server, entity framework. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: MetricWave is hiring a junior c# developer to support building enterprise backend systems and internal business applications.
raw_text: Vacancy V071: C# Developer at MetricWave. Location: Remote. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 1.7 years. Required skills: c#, .net, asp.net core, sql server, entity framework, blazor, azure. Optional skills: message queues, clean architecture. Responsibilities: develop and maintain .NET services; integrate databases and internal systems; improve code quality, observability, and deployment flow.
